title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Lendingkart Capital India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Lendingkart Capital India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Lendingkart Capital India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Agra-based team.

About Lendingkart Capital India:
Lendingkart Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lendingkart Capital India!
